build.beforeDevCommand: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const cp=require('node:child_process');let d=process.cwd();while(!fs.existsSync(path.join(d,'package.json'))){const p=path.dirname(d);if(p===d)throw new Error('repo root not found');d=p;}const r=cp.spawnSync('pnpm',['--dir',d,'dev'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:process.platform==='win32'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const cp=require('node:child_process');let d=process.cwd();while(!fs.existsSync(path.join(d,'scripts','prepare-tauri-resources.mjs'))){const p=path.dirname(d);if(p===d)throw new Error('prepare script not found');d=p;}const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[path.join(d,'scripts','prepare-tauri-resources.mjs')],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1)"
